title: ItemsAdderAdditions
description: Extend ItemsAdder with extra actions, behaviours, and features
body:
## ItemsAdderAdditions Extend ItemsAdder with extra actions, behaviours, and features - configured inside your existing YML files.

_some of the features:_ **Not created by, or affiliated with, the author(s) of ItemsAdder!**
Text version Extend ItemsAdder with extra actions, behaviours, and features - configured inside your existing YML files. Read the documentation here: https://itemsadderadditions.com/en/docs
Join our discord for, support, sugestions, bugs, here: https://discord.gg/3Nn7qatZ8W Some of the features included are: - Connectable furnitures, chair/stair and table - Custom items shown directly inside the creative inventory - Custom toast messages There are much more features than that, the complete list is available on the wiki **Not created by, or affiliated with, the author(s) of ItemsAdder!**
